title: You Are So Beautiful
overview: Aymé Pigrenet, a recently widowed farmer, is eager to find a new wife to help him run his farm. Desperate, he seeks the aid of a local matchmaker who suggest that he go to Romania to find a new wife. There he meets Elena.

trailers.title: Je vous trouve très beau -  bande annonce
